---
title: "IFCD044 Sprint Backlog"
categories: [ifcd044, backlog]
---


<style>
tr:nth-child(0) {
  background-color: #b2b2b2!important;
  color: #f4f4f4!important;
}
</style>


![Sprint Backlog](/images/home/backlog.jpg){width="30%"}

## ``Sprint#2: Approaches Multi-Agent App I`` (July 2026)

::: {.column-page-right}
| Sprint | Day | Date | Topics |  Details Topics |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
| #2 | 04 |  06/07/2026 | - Planning Sprint#2: </br> (1) Plan Approaches Multi-Agent </br> (2) Plan readings </br> (3) Plan syllabus   </br></br>  - Week 1: Meetings, Impediments and Iterations  </br></br> - **SCRUM Guide**  </br> - Approaches Multi-Agent App: **AWS Architecture** |  ![](/images/ifcd044-26/sprint-1.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}</br> - [Week#01](/scrum/scrum-week1.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [SCRUM Guide](/scrum/scrum-what-guide.qmd){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [Scrum Summary](https://albertprofe.dev/images/ifcd0210-26/docs/SCRUM-summary.html){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [AWS](https://aws.amazon.com/){.external target='_blank'} / [bedrock](https://aws.amazon.com/es/bedrock/){.external target='_blank'}</br> ![](/images/ifcd044-26/ApproachesMulti-AgentApp-architecture.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </br> - [Multi-Agent App AWS Architecture](/images/ifcd044-26/Multi-AgentApp.pdf){.external target='_blank'}|
|  | 05 | 07/07/2026 |  - **Week 2: User stories, Tasks and Habits** </br></br> - SCRUM: </br> (1) Guide: **values** </br> (2) Manifesto: 12 principles </br> (3) **Meetings**: does we need it? really? roles? time? goal/type? boycotts? nextTo?  </br></br> - CifoLab 13:00  | - [Week#02](/scrum/scrum-week2.qmd){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [SCRUM Guide](/scrum/scrum-what-guide.qmd){.external target='_blank'}</br> - [Agile Project Success and Failure (The Story of the FBI Sentinel Program)](https://www.sei.cmu.edu/documents/4082/2017_017_001_495733.pdf){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [SCRUM: summary](/images/ifcd0210-26/docs/SCRUM-summary.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br> ![](/images/ifcd044-26/scrum-cloud-keywords.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </br>  |
|  | 06 | 08/07/2026 |  - Week 2: User stories, Tasks and Habits </br> <s>- Week 3: Delivering Value & Communication</s>  </br></br> - SCRUM </br> (1) Manifesto: 12 principles </br> (2) Meetings: does we need it? really? roles? time? goal/type? metrics? boycotts? nextTo? </br> (3) **Meetings**: counter-measures </br> (4) decision-making: type? **irrelevant decision-making discussion**  </br> (5) decision-making: irreversible or not? high-complexity or not? |  - [Week#03](/scrum/scrum-week3.qmd){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [SCRUM Manifesto: 12 principles](/scrum/scrum-what-agile-manifesto.qmd){.external target='_blank'}</br>   |
|  | 07 | 09/07/2026 | - Week 2: User stories, Tasks and Habits </br> - <s>Week 3: Delivering Value & Communication  </br> - Week 4: ScrumMaster, how it works  </s></br></br>  - SCRUM: </br> (1) Manifesto: 12 principles  </br> (2) common vocabulary: scrum vocabulary, linkein, etc.. </br> (3) definition of done: why, done-template, counter-mesures, metrics   </br> (4) planning poker fibonacci: decision-making    </br></br>     |  - [Week#04](/scrum/scrum-week4.qmd){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [SCRUM Manifesto: 12 principles](/scrum/scrum-what-agile-manifesto.qmd){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [complex system](https://www.complexsystemsframeworks.ca/complex-vs-complicated/){.external target='_blank'} </br> ![](/images/ifcd044-26/Stacey-Matrix-scaled.jpg){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}  </br> - [linkedin job](https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/view/4435553660/){.external target='_blank'} |
|  | 08 | 10/07/2026 | Week 5: Mindset, the key to everything  </br></br>  |  - [Week#05](/scrum/scrum-week5.qmd){.external target='_blank'}   |
: Sprint #2  Backlog course July 2026 table {tbl-colwidths="[2,2,2,60,34]"}
:::

::: {.callout-note title="Legend"}
- `-` > topic planned and **done**
- `- ` <s>done</s> > topic not done in class (**pending**)
- `++` > not-planned new topic
:::
